description: Style NoteAdd a pop of colour to your Summer wear wardrobe with this kurta from myntra. Featuring a colourful, all over print and made from pure cotton this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look.Product DetailsRed with orange floral printed kurta, round neck with orange facing, short placket with fabric buttons, three quarter sleeves, vented hemMaterials and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
